RC522_DESCRIPTION: Blocks for the RC522 RFID reader/writer.
RC522_CONSTRUCTOR_MESSAGE0: create $[CONSTRUCTED_VAR_NAME] on SPI $[SPI_INSTANCE] with CS pin $[CS_PIN]
RC522_STARTPOLLING_MESSAGE0: start polling cards with $[RC522_INSTANCE] every $[INTERVAL] ms
RC522_STARTPOLLING_TOOLTIP: Start polling for cards at a fixed interval
RC522_ISCARDPRESENT_TOOLTIP: Check whether a card is currently in the field
RC522_READUID_TOOLTIP: Read the UID as raw bytes
RC522_READUIDTEXT_TOOLTIP: Read the UID and format it as a hex string
RC522_UIDTOSTRING_TOOLTIP: Format a raw UID array as a hex string
RC522_AUTHENTICATE_MESSAGE0: $[RC522_INSTANCE] authenticate block $[BLOCK] with key type $[KEY_TYPE] and key $[KEY]
RC522_AUTHENTICATE_TOOLTIP: Authenticate before reading or writing protected sectors
RC522_GETVERSION_TOOLTIP: Read the RC522 chip version register
RC522_ANTENNAON_TOOLTIP: Turn the antenna on or off
RC522_READBLOCKTEXT_TOOLTIP: Read UTF-8 text from a single block
RC522_WRITEBLOCKTEXT_TOOLTIP: Write UTF-8 text into a single block
RC522_READTEXTRECORD_MESSAGE0: $[RC522_INSTANCE] read text record starting at block $[START_BLOCK]
RC522_READTEXTRECORD_TOOLTIP: Read a text record stored across consecutive blocks
RC522_WRITETEXTRECORD_MESSAGE0: $[RC522_INSTANCE] write text record $[TEXT] starting at block $[START_BLOCK]
RC522_WRITETEXTRECORD_TOOLTIP: Write a text record across consecutive blocks
RC522_READBLOCKUINT32_TOOLTIP: Read a 32-bit unsigned integer from a block
RC522_WRITEBLOCKUINT32_TOOLTIP: Write a 32-bit unsigned integer into a block
RC522_ONCARD_TOOLTIP: Run code when the reader detects a new card
RC522_HALTCARD_TOOLTIP: Put the current card into sleep state
RC522_STOPCRYPTO_TOOLTIP: Stop the crypto engine after a card session
